summary: Iteration 5 regression smoke after type hint additions to /app/backend/seed/seed_data.py. All three demo logins return 200 with valid JWT and correct user role, GET /api/products returns 200 with 12 seeded products, and frontend home page renders hero, branding, and product cards with no console/page errors. No behavioral regression.

notes: Razorpay /api/orders/{id}/pay remains MOCKED per problem statement; not exercised in this smoke pass.
